title: Earnings call transcript: Lemonade Q4 2024 sees revenue growth, stock dips
text: Lemonade Q4 2024 earnings call transcript: revenue growth but stock dips. Q4 revenue $149 million, 29% year-over-year growth. In-force premium $944 million, 26% growth. Gross profit doubled to $167 million full-year. Net loss $30 million Q4, or $0.42 per share. First cash flow positive year: $48 million adjusted free cash flow. Gross loss ratio improved to 63% from 77% prior year. Customer growth 20% to 2.4 million. Despite strong financial results, stock experienced pullback in after-hours trading, potentially profit-taking after strong run or market disappointment on guidance. 2025 guidance: in-force premium growth 28%, $135-140 million adjusted EBITDA loss. Growth spend increase 40% year-over-year. California wildfire net impact $20 million after reinsurance. Management maintaining confidence in path to EBITDA profitability 2025-2026.
